query: SELECT wl.id, wl.userId, u.username, wl.type, wl.amount, wl.description, wl.balanceBefore, wl.balanceAfter, wl.createdAt FROM wallet_ledger wl LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = wl.userId ORDER BY wl.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
